I was born and raised in Korea, and I moved to Australia 11 years ago. For me, sharing the food I cook is more than just a conversation \u2014 it feels like a deep connection. A meal prepared with care can be an act of self-love, a source of comfort, and at the same time, a tender expression of affection toward family and friends. Even with cultural differences, food has allowed me to build bridges \u2014 to grow closer to friends and colleagues, and to create a sense of intimacy. No matter how tough the day was, cooking has always been a moment of healing for me."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"I express and rediscover myself through cooking"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),"Jeena's Kitchen is a space where I explore the thoughts, stories, and flavours that have shaped me \u2014 especially between the different cultural identities I've come to hold. When I first came to study abroad, my goals were simple: finish school, find a job. Living in a new country with an unfamiliar system, I constantly tried to adapt \u2014 reading the room, meeting expectations, doing what was needed to \"fit in.\" But in the process, I slowly began to lose sight of who I really was. That's when questions began to bubble up:"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["\"Who am I, really?\"",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),"\"What do I truly love?\"",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),"\"How do I want to be as I am in Australia?\""]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Connect with myself through cooking"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),"Through cooking Korean food, I found a way to reconnect with my roots. I also found new ways of telling stories \u2014 not just to others, but to myself. Jeena's Kitchen is like a small lab where I explore how to relate to myself, to others, and to society in a healthier way. It's a space where I build my own little universe \u2014 through food."]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"You don't have to be a great cook to be here"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),"Whether you're missing your mom's food, looking for comfort while eating alone, or simply moving through life at your own pace \u2014 I hope Jeena's Kitchen can be a small moment of rest for you. For now, I mostly focus on Korean dishes. But I hope to gently open the door to recipes from all kinds of cultures, and share the joy of inclusive cooking with many more people. Most of all, I hope this becomes a space where a warm, caring community can grow \u2014 one meal at a
